changelog:
- Fix: false 5/5 squad count when 0 squads out — OCR now primary, strict template fallback
- Fix: false 'recovery failed' when actually on world map — looser threshold + no-popup shortcut
- Fix: memory leak over long runs — mss handle cleanup on task replacement (WinError 1455 root cause)
- Fix: AttachThreadInput leak in bring_to_front (try/finally)
- Fix: GDI handle leaks in screenshot paths (try/finally)
- Fix: Tkinter crash on Stop Automation (thread-safe log + join before clear)
- Fix: unbounded Tk log widget — auto-trim at 2000 lines
- Fix: detect all 12 clients (PID scan + title scan dedup)
- Fix: restore template-click recovery (return_arrow / close_popup / close_challenge)
